// ── HELPERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function v(id){const e=document.getElementById(id);return e?e.value:"";}
function c(id){const e=document.getElementById(id);return e&&e.checked;}
function sq(chk){return `<div class="msq">${chk?"&#10003;":""}</div>`;}

function getDate(){
  const raw=v("rx_date");
  if(raw){const[y,m,d]=raw.split("-");return `${m}/${d}/${y}`;}
  const n=new Date();return `${n.getMonth()+1}/${n.getDate()}/${n.getFullYear()}`;
}

// ── ADDR STRIP ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderAddrStrip(el){
  const loc = v("office_loc");
  if(!loc){
    el.innerHTML = `
      <span class="loc-other">3375 Capital Cir NE, Building C100 &bull; Tallahassee, FL 32308 &bull; Ph 850-766-7018 &bull; Fax 850-387-0590</span>
      &nbsp;&nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp;&nbsp;
      <span class="loc-other">2629 W 23rd St, Unit F &bull; Panama City, FL 32405 &bull; Ph 850-766-7018 &bull; Fax 850-387-0590</span>`;
    return;
  }
  const talla = {addr:"3375 Capital Cir NE, Building C100 &bull; Tallahassee, FL 32308", ph:"850-766-7018", fax:"850-387-0590"};
  const pc    = {addr:"2629 W 23rd St, Unit F &bull; Panama City, FL 32405", ph:"850-766-7018", fax:"850-387-0590"};

  if(loc === "tallahassee"){
    el.innerHTML = `<span class="loc-selected">&#10003; ${talla.addr} &bull; Ph ${talla.ph} &bull; Fax ${talla.fax}</span>
      &nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp;
      <span class="loc-other">2629 W 23rd St, Unit F &bull; Panama City, FL 32405</span>`;
  } else {
    el.innerHTML = `<span class="loc-other">3375 Capital Cir NE, Building C100 &bull; Tallahassee, FL 32308</span>
      &nbsp;&mdash;&nbsp;
      <span class="loc-selected">&#10003; ${pc.addr} &bull; Ph ${pc.ph} &bull; Fax ${pc.fax}</span>`;
  }
}

// ── DIAGNOSES ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function getRelevantDx(){
  const seen=new Set(),res=[];
  const add=g=>{for(const d of DX_MAP[g]){if(!seen.has(d.id)){seen.add(d.id);res.push(d);}}};
  if(c("cervical_wo")||c("seated_cerv")||c("alar")) add("cervical");
  if(c("thoracic_wo"))                              add("thoracic");
  if(c("lumbar_wo")||c("seated_lumb")||c("harness")||c("sacral")) add("lumbar");
  if(c("shoulder_wo")||c("shoulder_l")||c("shoulder_r")) add("shoulder");
  if(c("knee_wo")||c("knee_l")||c("knee_r"))        add("knee");
  if(c("elbow_wo")||c("elbow_l")||c("elbow_r"))     add("elbow");
  if(c("wrist_wo")||c("wrist_l")||c("wrist_r"))     add("elbow");
  if(c("ankle_wo")||c("ankle_l")||c("ankle_r"))     add("ankle");
  if(c("brain_wo")){
    if(!seen.has("headache"))   {seen.add("headache");   res.push({id:"headache",   lbl:"Headache (R51)"});}
    if(!seen.has("concussion")) {seen.add("concussion"); res.push({id:"concussion", lbl:"Concussion (S06.0X0)"});}
  }
  return res;
}

// ── MAIN RENDER ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function render(){
  // Logo + sidebar logo
  const logo = IMG_CIG;
  ["pv-logo","pv-logo2","sb-logo"].forEach(id=>{const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.src=logo;});

  // Physician
  document.getElementById("pv-physician").textContent = "Mohammad Eldeeb, M.D.";
  // Signature image
  const sigEl = document.getElementById("pv-sig");
  if(sigEl && IMG_DEEB) { sigEl.src = IMG_DEEB; sigEl.style.display = "block"; }
  const sigTextEl = document.getElementById("pv-sig-text");
  if(sigTextEl) sigTextEl.style.display = "none";

  // Date
  const ds = getDate();
  document.getElementById("pv-date").textContent  = ds;
  document.getElementById("pv-date2").textContent = ds;

  // Location badge
  const loc = v("office_loc");
  const locBadge = document.getElementById("pv-loc-badge");
  if(locBadge){
    if(loc) locBadge.innerHTML = `Issuing Office: <strong>${OFFICES[loc].name}</strong>`;
    else    locBadge.innerHTML = `<span style="color:#c00;">⚠ Select office location in sidebar</span>`;
  }

  // Office bar below header
  const obUnset = document.getElementById("office-bar-unset");
  const obBar = document.getElementById("office-bar");
  if(loc && OFFICES[loc]){
    const o = OFFICES[loc];
    if(obUnset) obUnset.style.display = "none";
    if(obBar)   obBar.classList.add("show");
    const obName = document.getElementById("ob-name");
    const obAddr = document.getElementById("ob-addr");
    const obContact = document.getElementById("ob-contact");
    if(obName)    obName.textContent = o.name + " — Capital Injury Group";
    if(obAddr)    obAddr.textContent = o.addr1 + " · " + o.addr2;
    if(obContact) obContact.innerHTML = `Ph: ${o.phone} &nbsp;|&nbsp; Fax: ${o.fax}<br>${o.email}`;
  } else {
    if(obUnset) obUnset.style.display = "block";
    if(obBar)   obBar.classList.remove("show");
  }

  // Address strips
  ["addr-strip-p1","addr-strip-p2"].forEach(id=>{
    const el=document.getElementById(id);if(el)renderAddrStrip(el);
  });

  // STAT
  if(c("is_stat")) document.getElementById("stat-banner").classList.add("show");
  else             document.getElementById("stat-banner").classList.remove("show");

  // MRI list
  let mh="";
  for(const s of MRI_STUDIES){
    if(!c(s.id)) continue;
    let nm = s.custom ? v("custom_ext_text") : s.name;
    if(!nm) continue;
    let sideStr="";
    if(s.sides){
      const sl=c(s.sides[0]),sr=c(s.sides[1]);
      if(sl&&sr) sideStr=" — Bilateral";
      else if(sl) sideStr=" — Left";
      else if(sr) sideStr=" — Right";
    }
    const nc = s.color||"#111";
    const bg = s.protocol ? `background:${s.color}15;border-left:3px solid ${s.color};padding-left:5px;border-radius:2px;` : "";
    mh+=`<div class="mri-row" style="${bg}">${sq(true)}<div><div class="study-name" style="color:${nc}">${nm}${sideStr}</div><div class="study-sub">${s.sub}</div></div></div>`;
  }
  if(!mh) mh=`<div class="mri-empty">Select studies from the sidebar.</div>`;
  document.getElementById("mri-list").innerHTML=mh;
  document.getElementById("nl1").textContent=v("notes");

  // Protocols
  const hasCerv=c("cervical_wo")||c("seated_cerv"),hasThor=c("thoracic_wo"),
        hasLumb=c("lumbar_wo")||c("seated_lumb")||c("harness"),
        hasAlar=c("alar"),hasSacral=c("sacral"),
        hasAny=hasCerv||hasThor||hasLumb||hasAlar||hasSacral||c("brain_wo")||c("shoulder_wo")||c("knee_wo");
  let tech="";
  if(!hasAny) tech=`<div class="tech-empty">Select MRI studies to display imaging protocols.</div>`;
  else {
    if(hasCerv)  tech+=`<div class="tech-line"><strong>Cervical Spine:</strong> Sagittal: Neutral T2\T1\STIR | Flexion\Extension T2 | Axial T2</div>`;
    if(hasThor)  tech+=`<div class="tech-line"><strong>Thoracic Spine:</strong> Sagittal T2\T1\STIR | Axial T2 | Coronal T2\STIR</div>`;
    if(hasLumb)  tech+=`<div class="tech-line"><strong>Lumbar Spine:</strong> Sagittal: Neutral T2\T1\STIR | Axial T2</div>`;
    if(hasAlar)  tech+=`<div class="tech-line"><strong>Alar Ligament Protocol:</strong> Proton Density: Coronal\Axial\Sagittal</div>`;
    if(hasSacral)tech+=`<div class="tech-line"><strong>Sacral Plexus Protocol:</strong> Sagittal T2 Fat-Sat\STIR | Coronal T2\STIR</div>`;
  }
  document.getElementById("tech-protocols").innerHTML=tech;

  // Diagnoses
  const rdx=getRelevantDx();
  let dxh="";
  if(!rdx.length){
    dxh=`<div class="dx-two-col"><div class="dx-col-left"><div class="dx-col-hdr">Indication for Study</div><div class="dx-empty">Select studies to populate.</div></div><div class="dx-col-right"><div class="dx-col-hdr">Diagnosis</div><div class="dx-empty">Select studies to populate.</div></div></div>`;
  } else {
    const inds=[{id:"ind_mvc",lbl:"Motor vehicle crash (MVC)"},{id:"ind_work",lbl:"Work-related injury"},{id:"ind_slip",lbl:"Slip and fall injury"},{id:"ind_sport",lbl:"Sports injury"},{id:"ind_other",lbl:"Other"}];
    let lh=`<div class="dx-col-hdr">Indication for Study</div>`;
    for(const ind of inds){
      lh+=`<div class="dx-item"><div class="msq" onclick="toggleInd('${ind.id}')" id="sq-${ind.id}" style="cursor:pointer;">${window["ind_"+ind.id+"_checked"]?"&#10003;":""}</div> <span>${ind.lbl}</span></div>`;
    }
    let rh=`<div class="dx-col-hdr">Diagnosis</div>`;
    for(const dx of rdx){
      rh+=`<div class="dx-item"><div class="msq" onclick="toggleDx('${dx.id}')" id="sq-${dx.id}" style="cursor:pointer;">${window["dx_"+dx.id+"_checked"]?"&#10003;":""}</div> <span>${dx.lbl}</span></div>`;
    }
    rh+=`<div class="dx-other-row"><div class="msq" id="sq-other-dx" onclick="toggleDx('other-dx')" style="cursor:pointer;">${window["dx_other-dx_checked"]?"&#10003;":""}</div><span style="white-space:nowrap;">Other:</span><input type="text" id="other-dx-text" style="flex:1;border:none;border-bottom:0.7px solid #444;outline:none;font-size:9pt;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;padding:1px 4px;background:transparent;min-width:80px;" placeholder="Free text diagnosis..." oninput="document.getElementById('sq-other-dx').innerHTML=this.value?'&#10003;':''"></div>`;
    dxh=`<div class="dx-two-col"><div class="dx-col-left">${lh}</div><div class="dx-col-right">${rh}</div></div>`;
  }
  document.getElementById("dx-content").innerHTML=dxh;

  // Page 2 patient fields
  document.getElementById("p2-name").textContent  = v("pt_name");
  document.getElementById("p2-dob").textContent   = v("pt_dob");
  document.getElementById("p2-phone").textContent = v("pt_phone");
  document.getElementById("p2-dol").textContent   = v("pt_dol");
  document.getElementById("p2-ins").textContent   = v("pt_ins");
  document.getElementById("p2-claim").textContent = v("pt_claim");
  document.getElementById("p2-atty").textContent  = v("pt_atty");

  renderLocSelector();
  renderCenters();
}

// ── LOCATION SELECTOR (page 2 — only selected shows) ─────────────────────
function renderLocSelector(){
  const loc = v("office_loc");
  const grid = document.getElementById("loc-grid");
  const hint = document.getElementById("loc-hint");
  const spotlight = document.getElementById("loc-spotlight");

  if(!loc){
    // No location selected — show both cards as unselected choosers
    hint.style.display="block";
    spotlight.classList.remove("show");
    let gh="";
    Object.entries(OFFICES).forEach(([key,o])=>{
      gh+=`<div class="loc-card" onclick="selectOfficePage2('${key}')">
        <div class="lc-name">${o.name} — Capital Injury Group</div>
        <div class="lc-addr">${o.addr1}<br>${o.addr2}<br>Ph: ${o.phone} | Fax: ${o.fax}</div>
      </div>`;
    });
    grid.innerHTML=gh;
    return;
  }

  // Location selected — show only that one in spotlight, hide grid
  hint.style.display="none";
  grid.innerHTML="";
  spotlight.classList.add("show");
  const o = OFFICES[loc];
  document.getElementById("loc-spotlight-info").innerHTML=`
    <div class="spotlight-name">${o.name} — Capital Injury Group</div>
    <div class="spotlight-det">
      ${o.addr1}<br>${o.addr2}<br>
      Ph: ${o.phone} &nbsp;|&nbsp; Fax: ${o.fax}<br>
      ${o.email}
    </div>
    <div style="margin-top:6px;font-size:8pt;color:#888;font-family:Arial,sans-serif;">Send imaging results &amp; CD to this location</div>`;
  document.getElementById("loc-spotlight-map").src=
    `https://maps.google.com/maps?q=${encodeURIComponent(o.map)}&output=embed&z=15`;
}

function selectOfficePage2(key){
  document.getElementById("office_loc").value = key;
  render();
}

// ── IMAGING CENTERS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function renderCenters(){
  const loc = v("office_loc");
  const grid = document.getElementById("centers-grid");
  const hint = document.getElementById("ctr-hint");
  const spotlight = document.getElementById("ctr-spotlight");
  const lbl = document.getElementById("centers-lbl");

  // Which centers to show
  let ctrs = [];
  if(loc && CENTERS[loc]) ctrs = CENTERS[loc];
  else { ctrs = [...(CENTERS.tallahassee||[]), ...(CENTERS.panamacity||[])]; }

  if(selectedCenter >= 0 && selectedCenter < ctrs.length){
    const ctr = ctrs[selectedCenter];
    spotlight.classList.add("show");
    hint.style.display="none";
    document.getElementById("ctr-spotlight-info").innerHTML=`
      <div class="ctr-spotlight-name">${ctr.name}</div>
      <div class="ctr-spotlight-city">${ctr.city}</div>
      <div class="ctr-spotlight-det">${ctr.det.replace(/\n/g,"<br>")}</div>
      <div class="ctr-spotlight-back" onclick="clearCenter()">&#8592; Show all imaging centers</div>`;
    // map removed
    grid.innerHTML=`<div class="ctr selected">
      <div class="ctr-name">${ctr.name}</div>
      <div class="ctr-city">${ctr.city}</div>
      <div class="ctr-det">${ctr.det.split("\n")[0]}<br>${ctr.det.split("\n")[1]||""}</div>
    </div>`;
    return;
  }

  spotlight.classList.remove("show");
  hint.style.display="block";
  let gh="";
  ctrs.forEach((ctr,i)=>{
    gh+=`<div class="ctr" onclick="selectCenter(${i})">
      <div class="ctr-name">${ctr.name}</div>
      <div class="ctr-city">${ctr.city}</div>
      <div class="ctr-det">${ctr.det.split("\n")[0]}<br>${ctr.det.split("\n")[1]||""}</div>
    </div>`;
  });
  grid.innerHTML=gh;
  if(lbl && loc){
    const locName = loc==="tallahassee"?"Tallahassee":"Panama City";
    lbl.textContent=`Preferred Imaging Centers — ${locName}`;
  } else if(lbl){
    lbl.textContent="Preferred Imaging Centers";
  }
}

function selectCenter(i){ selectedCenter=i; renderCenters(); }
function clearCenter(){ selectedCenter=-1; renderCenters(); }

// ── PREVIEW / EXPORT ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function showPreview(){
  const src=document.getElementById("pdf-content");
  const clone=src.cloneNode(true);
  clone.style.transform="scale(0.63)";
  clone.style.transformOrigin="top center";
  clone.style.width="856px";
  clone.style.marginBottom="-37%";
  const container=document.getElementById("modal-content");
  container.innerHTML="";
  container.appendChild(clone);
  document.getElementById("preview-modal").classList.add("show");
}
function closePreview(){ document.getElementById("preview-modal").classList.remove("show"); }
function doExport(){ closePreview(); setTimeout(exportPDF, 100); }
function exportPDF(){
  const nm=v("pt_name").replace(/\s+/g,"_")||"MRI_Prescription";
  const hint=document.getElementById("ctr-hint"); hint.style.display="none";
  const lochint=document.getElementById("loc-hint"); if(lochint)lochint.style.display="none";
  html2pdf().set({
    margin:0, filename:nm+"_CIG_MRI_Prescription.pdf",
    image:{type:"jpeg",quality:0.97},
    html2canvas:{scale:2,useCORS:true,letterRendering:true,windowWidth:856},
    jsPDF:{unit:"pt",format:[856,1108],orientation:"portrait"},
    pagebreak:{before:".pg:nth-child(2)"}
  }).from(document.getElementById("pdf-content")).save().then(()=>{
    hint.style.display="block";
    if(lochint)lochint.style.display="block";
  });
}

// Airtable integration not implemented at this location

// ── TOGGLES ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
function toggleInd(id){
  const key="ind_"+id+"_checked"; window[key]=!window[key];
  const el=document.getElementById("sq-"+id); if(el)el.innerHTML=window[key]?"&#10003;":"";
}
function toggleDx(id){
  const key="dx_"+id+"_checked"; window[key]=!window[key];
  const el=document.getElementById("sq-"+id); if(el)el.innerHTML=window[key]?"&#10003;":"";
}
function clearAll(){
  document.querySelectorAll("input[type=checkbox]").forEach(e=>e.checked=false);
  ["pt_name","pt_dob","pt_dol","pt_phone","pt_ins","pt_claim","pt_atty","notes","custom_ext_text"].forEach(id=>{
    const e=document.getElementById(id);if(e)e.value="";
  });
  document.getElementById("office_loc").value="";
  selectedCenter=-1; selectedCenterLoc=null;
  render();
}

// ── INIT ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
const t=new Date();
document.getElementById("rx_date").value=`${t.getFullYear()}-${String(t.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,"0")}-${String(t.getDate()).padStart(2,"0")}`;
render();
</script>
